hooks.command: /bin/zsh -c 'b=docs/backlog.md; h=docs/handoff.md; [[ -f $b && -f $h ]] || exit 0; bt=$(stat -f %m $b 2>/dev/null); ht=$(stat -f %m $h 2>/dev/null); [[ -n $bt && -n $ht && $bt -gt $ht ]] && echo "⚠️  handoff.md is stale — backlog.md was updated more recently. Update handoff before closing."'
